subject: [PATCH v1 03/11] io_uring/kbuf: add support for kernel-managed buffer rings

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with encoding buffer layout information in the region uapi, which could lead to awkward indirection and pollute a general abstraction. Also pointed out that THP is not guaranteed and may not meet high-performance FUSE server requirements.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: Joanne raised concerns about the buffer layout information being encoded in the region uapi, which would introduce awkward indirection and pollute a general abstraction.
